concerns.text: FR-001 states the system must generate a trial configuration file with random treatment allocation, but does not specify how the randomness will be verified (e.g., fixed seed, statistical test, or reproducible audit). Add an explicit verification procedure so the requirement is testable.

FR-004 requires execution of a mixed‑effects regression model with specific fixed effects and interaction, yet the spec does not describe how to confirm those terms are present in the fitted model (e.g., inspection of model formula, presence of coefficient names, or unit test). Provide a concrete testable criterion.
